characters.name: Adam Dubanowski
characters.description: Adam DubanowskiPersonal InformationStatusAliveFamilyEmma Dubanowski(daughter)Parker Dubanowski(son)RelationshipsAmy Sosa(ex-wife)Bridgett(ex-girlfriend)Series InformationActorRyan GaulEpisodes10First AppearanceColor WarsLast AppearanceQuinceañeraAdam Dubanowskiis the ex-husband ofAmyand father ofEmmaandParker. He was a wrestler and a football player in high school where he met Amy. At 19, Amy got pregnant and they were married. He is portrayed by actorRyan Gaul. Parker Dubanowski(son) Bridgett(ex-girlfriend) Unfocused and irresponsible, Adam is constantly jumping between different business ideas and ventures, all of which have failed due to his total lack of foresight. On top of this, his lack of self-awareness and unrealistic expectations causes him to commit the same mistakes over and over again, causing stress for Amy. Adam can be quite inconsiderate to Amy, at one point abruptly canceling his plans with Emma so he could pursue an entrepreneur conference, thus depriving Amy of her much needed free weekend. Despite his shortcomings, Adam does genuinely care for Amy and their daughter, and later their son and showed no signs of malice or ill-will towards Amy after the divorce.

characters.name: Amber
characters.description: AmberPersonal InformationStatusAliveSeries InformationActorJolene PurdyEpisodes1First AppearanceVideo Game ReleaseAmberis a visitor toCloud 9 Store 1217. He is portrayed by actorJolene Purdy. I don't know. AsGlennandSandraassert their authority around the store so as not to be treated like doormats anymore, they see Amber sitting in a store display breastfeeding her baby. They force Amber to vacate the chair since the display has a sign forbidding sitting. Amber returns with a group of breastfeeding mothers to protest her rude treatment. Glenn and Sandra try unsuccessfully to have the mothers move.Dinaarrives with news that her implantation has worked which starts Glenn blubbering since he's going to be a father. As he mentions that he's going to callJerushawith the good news, Amber and the other mothers express confusion with Glenn and Dina's situation.("Video Game Release")

characters.name: Amy Sosa
characters.description: Amy SimmsPersonal InformationOccupationFloor Supervisor(Unknown-2019)Assistant Manager(briefly)Store Manager(2019-2020)Director of Customer Experience(2020-2021)Unknown corporate job(2021-present)NicknamesAme, AmesBean(byAdam)Rodriguez(byDina)Little Miss on Time; Workules; Bed, Bath and Beyoncé(byGlenn)Craymie(by herself)Consuela(byTate)A-Hole(byJonahand herself)The Aiming of the Shrew(byLaurie)Cloud9AmyD(social media username)Also seeAmy's name tagStatusAliveFamilyRon Sosa(father)Connie Sosa(mother)Eric Sosa(brother)Jonah Simms(husband)Emma Dubanowski(daughter)Parker Dubanowski(son)Carter Simms(son)Richard Simms(father-in-law)Marilyn Simms(mother-in-law)Mateo Liwanag(brother-in-law)Josh Simms(brother-in-law)Unnamed sisterUnnamed brother-in-lawUnnamed grandmother(deceased)Unnamed grandfather{deceased)RelationshipsDina Fox(best friend)Adam Dubanowski(ex-husband)Alex(ex-boyfriend)Jonah Simms(husband)Series InformationActorAmerica FerreraEpisodes103First AppearancePilotLast AppearanceAll Sales FinalAmelia "Amy" Simms(néeSosa, formerlyDubanowski) was the floor supervisor, then progressed to store manager ofCloud 9 Store 1217. She became pregnant with her daughterEmmain high school and married the father,Adam, shortly after. Amy was accepted into a good college, but was unable to attend due to the pregnancy and having to work to support her family. She is of Honduran descent. She is portrayed by actressAmerica Ferrera. Assistant Manager(briefly)Store Manager(2019-2020)Director of Customer Experience(2020-2021)Unknown corporate job(2021-present) Bean(byAdam)Rodriguez(byDina)Little Miss on Time; Workules; Bed, Bath and Beyoncé(byGlenn)Craymie(by herself)Consuela(byTate)A-Hole(byJonahand herself)The Aiming of the Shrew(byLaurie)Cloud9AmyD(social media username)Also seeAmy's name tag Amy tends to take care of others often at her own expense. She takes on too much responsibility and meddles in other people's business, even against better advice or obvious signs how it would turn out, which usually ends badly. LikeJonah, she tries to stay in control and ahead of a situation she herself created by piling up white lies until the situation collapses back upon her. However, she can outmaneuver Jonah on more than one occasion when engaged in dishonest communication on both sides. Amy sees her younger self inCheyenne's situation, and gives her advice that she wishes she had taken herself back in the day, such as not marrying too young. Amy is often a little bossy towards the employees of the store but, unlikeDina, she is always fair. She is very polite, sometimes sarcastic, and really cares about the employees. She gives cues to nudge people into directions of her convenience, but they almost never pick up on them or derail the situation to something entirely different, much to her frustration. characters.personality_section: Amy tends to take care of others often at her own expense. She takes on too much responsibility and meddles in other people's business, even against better advice or obvious signs how it would turn out, which usually ends badly. LikeJonah, she tries to stay in control and ahead of a situation she herself created by piling up white lies until the situation collapses back upon her. However, she can outmaneuver Jonah on more than one occasion when engaged in dishonest communication on both sides. Amy sees her younger self inCheyenne's situation, and gives her advice that she wishes she had taken herself back in the day, such as not marrying too young. Amy is often a little bossy towards the employees of the store but, unlikeDina, she is always fair. She is very polite, sometimes sarcastic, and really cares about the employees. She gives cues to nudge people into directions of her convenience, but they almost never pick up on them or derail the situation to something entirely different, much to her frustration. Amy often acts defensively and awkward, such as when her coworkers bring up her flirting with Jonah. She tends to have her guard up in an effort to protect herself from making rash decisions, but sometimes lets her guard down when she's having fun, showing a very fun and playful side.

characters.name: Benny
characters.description: BennyPersonal InformationStatusArrestedSeries InformationActorScott MacArthurEpisodes1First AppearanceCereal BarBennyis a scam artist who has connedCloud 9 Store 1217for months. He is attractive and has a deep voice. He is portrayed by actorScott MacArthur. At Customer Service, Benny is in line waiting to return aZephraZ-System.DinaapproachesGarrettand informs him that he has been returning fake items to the store for money for months. When Benny gets to the desk, Dina asks him to come with her to finalize his return. Dina and Benny enter a security room, Dina then exposes Benny for his past history with returning bogus items and reveals how the "Z-System" he was returning was just filled with rocks. Dina appears to be impressed with his scamming skills but denies it. Benny begins flirting with Dina, which she tries to resist but starts falling for him, making her excuse herself to get away. Dina asksCheyenneto ugly her up to make her less attractive to Benny, Cheyenne suggests Dina likes him but she denies. Dina brings Cheyenne to the room as "head of security", and Dina tries to get Benny to confess, but it quickly turns into flirting again and the two start aggressively making out, much to a confused Cheyenne.

characters.name: Bo Derek Thompson
characters.description: Bo Derek ThompsonPersonal InformationNicknamesDaveStatusAliveFamilyCheyenne Lee(wife)Harmonica(daughter)Brandi(mother in-law)Unnamed motherUnnamed fatherSeries InformationActorJohnny PembertonEpisodes15First AppearancePilotLast AppearanceAll Sales FinalBilbo "Bo" Derek ThompsonisCheyenne's husband and the father ofHarmonica. He is a wannabe-rapper, was briefly a store employee, and became a pharmacist tech after an unknown amount of time. He is portrayed by actorJohnny Pemberton. Unnamed motherUnnamed father Bo is very reckless and short sighted, as well being extremely immature. He is prone to immature arguments with Cheyenne and makes rash decisions when he is worried. Despite this, he cares deeply for his wife and daughter and can put aside his immaturity when he realizes he needs to.

characters.name: Bobbie Sue
characters.description: Bobbie SuePersonal InformationStatusAliveFamilyGlenn Sturgis(foster father)Jerusha Sturgis(foster mother)Kristen(foster sister)Leo(foster brother)T'Oliver(foster brother)Timur(foster brother)Zoe(foster sister)Elias(Uncle)Series InformationActorEmelia GolfieriandLayla GolfieriEpisodes1First AppearanceGlenn's KidsBobbie Sueis a visitor toCloud 9 Store 1217. She is one ofGlennandJerusha Sturgis'foster children. She is portrayed by twin actressesEmeliaandLayla Golfieri. Jerusha Sturgis(foster mother)Kristen(foster sister)Leo(foster brother)T'Oliver(foster brother)Timur(foster brother)Zoe(foster sister)Elias(Uncle) When Glenn brings his kids to work,Cheyenneoffers to take care of one of them named Bobbie Sue. While talking toGarrett, Cheyenne loses her. Bobbie Sue has numerous adventures in the store by herself including playing with a scanner, hiding among a bunch of dolls, trying on jewellery, stealing french fries and skipping behindTimas he pulls a pallet. Cheyenne finally finds her in the trap set by Garrett,Dinaand herself. Cheyenne delivers her to Glenn just in time for the Sturgis family photo.("Glenn's Kids")

characters.name: Bobby
characters.description: BobbyPersonal InformationStatusAliveSeries InformationActorAndrew DonnellyEpisodes2First AppearanceHalloween TheftLast AppearanceCereal Bar Bobbyis the Store Manager at theCloud 9 Chesterfield Store. He is portrayed by actorAndrew Donnelly. Glenn,AmyandMateovisit the Chesterfield store to find oddly-shaped fruit to replace the stolen basket atCloud 9 Store 1217. Glenn critiques the store and asks Bobby where the restrooms are, he questions how they are still open. Assistant ManagerKellyappears and tells Bobby that she finished marking down clearance items. Bobby asks her to work on the shrink reports which Kelly agrees to without hesitation. Glenn notes how nice Kelly is to Bobby which inspires him to exercise more authority over his Assistant ManagerDina.("Halloween Theft")

characters.name: Brett Kobashigawa
characters.description: Brett KobashigawaPersonal InformationStatusAliveFamilyUnnamed wifeSeries InformationActorJon MiyaharaEpisodes105First AppearancePilotLast AppearanceAll Sales FinalBrett Kobashigawawas an older sales associate atCloud 9 Store 1217in St. Louis, Missouri. Except for one time, he doesn't speak but is seen in numerous scenes. He is portrayed by actorJon Miyahara. Despite almost never seen speaking, Brett is noted for being an excellent sales person and is described as having an air of authority. He is often seen cleaning up after other people's messes and appears to be one of the few responsible employees of the store. He's just so excitable. characters.name: Brian Patterson
characters.description: Brian PattersonPersonal InformationStatusAliveFamilySue Patterson(mother)RelationshipsDina Fox(ex-girlfriend)Series InformationActorRory ScovelEpisodes4First AppearanceEmployee AppLast AppearanceLowell Anderson Dr.Brian Pattersonis a veterinarian who briefly datedDina Fox. He is portrayed by actorRory Scovel. Dina andAmymeet Brian at a vet center after Amy accidentally runs over a goose. Dina and Brian start to talk about their interest in birds which turns into mild flirting, Amy leaves to let the two continue flirting.("Employee App")

She was born in Kansas City and is of Latin heritage. She is bright and cheerful. She is portrayed by actressGrace Parra. Jess, Señor Cloud salsa is berry good for parties!

characters.name: Carol Malloon
characters.description: CarolPersonal InformationStatusAliveRelationshipsSandra Kaluiokalani(rival)Jerry(ex-boyfriend)Series InformationActorIrene WhiteEpisodes44First AppearanceMannequinLast AppearanceAll Sales Final Jerry(ex-boyfriend) Carol is a schemer and manipulator who has a habit of stealing men from her fellow co-workers (i.e. Adam andAlexfrom Amy, but more notablyJerryfromSandra). She has a bitter rivalry with Sandra and goes to creative lengths to get back at her. When in a relationship, she can be very domineering and demanding. She also likes to get involved in the usual workplace drama. Additionally, Carol is notoriously unstable, being suspended several times for her antics.

characters.name: Cheyenne Lee
characters.description: Cheyenne LeePersonal InformationNicknamesChey(byAmy)Rise and Cheyenne(byMateo)StatusAliveFamilyBo Derek Thompson(husband)Harmonica Thompson(daughter)Brandi(mother)Unnamed fatherUnnamed uncleSeries InformationActorNichole SakuraEpisodes102First AppearancePilotLast AppearanceAll Sales FinalCheyenne Taylor Thompson(néeLee) is a sales associate atCloud 9 Store 1217, and was later promoted to Floor Supervisor. She is married toBo Derek Thompsonand they have a daughter,Harmonica. She is portrayed by actressNichole Sakura. Rise and Cheyenne(byMateo) Cheyenne is very bubbly and fun, but also a little silly. She likes to gossip and bonds withGarrettandMateo. She tends to laugh maniacally when she is uncomfortable and looks up toAmy, often taking her advice and calling her "old and wise." Over time, she is shown to be much smarter than initially believed, such as when she organizes a store-wide car pool for all the staff, as well after her promotion to Floor Supervisor, when she uses unorthodox, yet successful methods of engaging with her employees.
